summary: Unit tests for TelegramSource covering checkpoint parsing, max-ID selection, error propagation, and invalid checkpoint fallback behaviour

observations.text: Uses mockFetcher that records all calls (username, afterMsgID, limit) for assertion — allows verifying that checkpoint is correctly parsed and passed through to the underlying Fetcher.
No compile-time interface assertion (var _ source.Source = ...) unlike hn_test.go, reddit_test.go, and rss_test.go. Minor inconsistency.
